Târgrat is at Nardur-stazg in Fanuidhol, north-west of Talan Fanuidhol. In his rage over your insults, Târgrat the Proud has forsaken the protection o…
Maenhador is at Talan Fanuidhol, south-east of Nardur-stazg. You should return to Maenhador with tidings of your victory against Târgrat.
